_meta.description: Cross-field consistency and logical coherence checks before finalizing answers.

checks.trigger: Section/heading mismatch between cited row and referenced value.
examples: Value shown under Assets but cited as liabilities heading.
Revenue table entry attributed to Summary section.

checks.trigger: One answer mixes YTD and quarter scopes without explicit conversion.
examples: Q2 figure compared to YTD total.
Month and quarter values blended in same paragraph.

checks.trigger: Numeric comparison spans two entities without explicit consolidation flag.
checks.check: query.compareEntities == true AND context.explicitEntityConsolidation == false AND context.entities.uniqCount > 1
examples: Compares BR and US entities as if single balance.

checks.trigger: Same calculation chain contains mixed currencies without explicit FX context.
examples: USD and BRL totals summed without conversion basis.
Local and reporting currency compared side by side.

checks.trigger: Values with different unit scales are combined.
examples: Adds thousands to units without scaling.
Mixes USD and USDk in totals.

rules.trigger: Debit/credit values appear with swapped sign convention between adjacent rows.
